question: आंध्र प्रदेश आणि अरुणाचल प्रदेश या राज्यांसाठी, प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव आणि जिल्हा आयडीची (district IDs) एकूण संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा, जर त्या राज्यासाठी जिल्हा आयडीची संख्या किमान एक असेल.

question: भारतातील पहिल्या ५ जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि तेथील बाल कल्याण केंद्रांची एकूण संख्या यांची यादी द्या, जी बाल कल्याण केंद्रांच्या एकूण संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावलेली असेल.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T5 ON T4.COUNTRY_ID = T5.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T5.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmc.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) AS total_child_welfare_centres
FROM DIM_DISTRICT d
JOIN DIM_STATE s ON d.STATE_ID = s.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY c ON s.COUNTRY_ID = c.COUNTRY_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmc ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE c.COUNTRY_NAME ILIKE 'India'
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY total_child_welfare_centres DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmc.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) AS total_child_welfare_centres
FROM DIM_DISTRICT d
JOIN DIM_STATE s ON d.STATE_ID = s.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY c ON s.COUNTRY_ID = c.COUNTRY_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmc ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE c.COUNTRY_NAME ILIKE 'India'
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY total_child_welfare_centres DESC
LIMIT 5;

    SUM(fmp.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS + fmp.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) AS TOTAL_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL
FROM DIM_DISTRICT dim_d
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT dim_sd ON dim_d.DISTRICT_ID = dim_sd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL fmp ON dim_sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmp.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE dim_d.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE '%North Andaman%'
   OR dim_d.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE '%Middle Andaman%'

   OR dim_d.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE '%South Andaman%'
GROUP BY dim_d.DISTRICT_NAME
HAVING SUM(fmp.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS + fmp.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) >= 0.00
ORDER BY TOTAL_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL DESC;
